name: Milopita ( Greek Apple Pastry )
recipeInstructions:
Note: Apples should be cored and peeled. If desired, 2 cups canned apples (drained) may be substituted.
1. Defrost frozen filo to room temperature, 2 to 4 hours.
2. Mix filling in a bowl, tossing ingredients with a spoon. Set aside.
3. Lay 5 sheets of filo flat, one on top of each other, brushing a little melted butter between the sheets.
4. Spread 1 cup of filling along one end of the filo.
5. Roll the filo over the apple filling to create a long filled tube.
6. Fold side edges over about 1/2 inch so the filling won't fall out. Continue rolling.
7. Place in a buttered baking pan or cookie sheet.
8. Brush tops generously with melted butter.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
10. Sift powdered sugar over tops and sides as soon as it is taken out of the oven and while still hot.
11. When cool, cut into 2-inch pieces and serve.
